text: Hey Jarvis, run through my schedule for today, please.
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, February 23. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Space science and tech is a great focus. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 2-1! Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. That's a big step. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. I've got the grocery list ready. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: The lawn mower is having issues starting. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Let's get that resolved. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Planning a street block party soon. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Social breaks are great. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Reading scientific papers late tonight. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Space science and tech is a great focus. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great progress. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Sarah found a new recipe to try. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hosted a game night at our place. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Neighborhood connections are fun. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
